status: draft
shortDescription: "An object contains only the fields declared in its class"
concepts:

related:
# - id: LiteralNoExpression

#   id: NoFieldInheritance

- id: StackHeapGlobalDiagram

An instance of a class contains exactly those fields declared in its class; fields declared in a superclass are not stored in the instances of the subclasses.

frontmatter.shortDescription: An object contains only the fields declared in its class
